note: Curated Microsoft 365 Copilot announcements. Edit this file to add or refine entries. Newest first. Fields: id, date (ISO yyyy-mm-dd), title, category, summary, link, source.

items.title: Legal Agent for Word
items.summary: A specialized agent in Microsoft Word that helps legal teams draft, review, and red-line contracts — surfacing risky clauses, suggesting standard language, and comparing against playbooks, all grounded in your organization's documents.

items.title: Copilot Cowork innovations
items.summary: New Cowork capabilities that let Copilot take on longer, multi-step work autonomously — planning a task, executing across apps, and checking in with you at key moments rather than turn-by-turn prompting.

items.title: Copilot Cowork
items.summary: Copilot Cowork shifts Copilot from an assistant you prompt to a teammate that works alongside you — handling end-to-end tasks, coordinating multiple agents, and producing finished deliverables with you in the loop.

items.title: Home and Finance chat
items.summary: A focused chat surface that brings finance context — reports, data, and the Finance Agent — into a single home, so finance professionals can ask questions and drive tasks without leaving the flow of work.

items.title: Finance Agent in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: A purpose-built agent for finance teams that automates common activities — variance analysis, reconciliation, reporting, and data gathering — grounded in your financial systems and the Microsoft 365 work graph.

items.title: Agentic AI transforms finance activities & responsibilities
items.summary: A view of how agentic AI reshapes the finance function — moving routine close, reporting, and analysis work to agents so finance professionals focus on judgment, strategy, and exceptions.

items.title: Agent 365 extends coverage to local agents
items.summary: Agent 365 governance now reaches agents running locally — bringing the same registry, identity, security, and management controls to agents beyond the cloud so IT keeps a complete, governed inventory.

items.title: Agent 365 SDK
items.summary: A developer SDK for building agents that plug into Agent 365 — inheriting enterprise identity, security, observability, and lifecycle management from the control plane so custom agents are governed by default.

items.title: 3rd Party Agents for Microsoft Teams
items.summary: Third-party and partner-built agents can now be brought into Microsoft Teams, letting organizations extend Copilot with specialized agents in the collaboration surface where work already happens.

items.title: Microsoft Teams SDK
items.summary: An updated SDK for building agents and apps that run natively in Microsoft Teams — making Teams a first-class surface for Copilot experiences and custom agents.

items.title: Frontier Tuning
items.summary: A Frontier program capability that lets organizations tune Copilot to their own data and tasks — improving relevance and quality for domain-specific work while early-access customers shape the roadmap.

items.title: What we are announcing at Build
items.summary: A roundup of the Microsoft 365 Copilot news at the annual developer conference — spanning Agent 365, new SDKs, the Work IQ API, and agentic experiences across the Microsoft Cloud.

items.title: Microsoft Scout
items.summary: Microsoft Scout is an agent that proactively researches and gathers information on your behalf — navigating sources, synthesizing findings, and returning a structured answer so you start from insight instead of a blank page.

items.title: Cost management in the M365 admin center
items.summary: New admin-center controls give IT visibility into Copilot and agent consumption — tracking usage and message-based costs, setting limits, and managing spend as agentic workloads scale across the organization.

items.title: Work IQ API
items.summary: Work IQ is the reasoning layer over the Microsoft 365 work graph — your people, content, and activity. The Work IQ API lets developers and agents build on that shared, permission-trimmed understanding of how work gets done.

items.title: Annual developer conference — June 2–3, San Francisco & online
items.summary: Save the date for Microsoft's annual developer conference — two days in San Francisco and online focused on building with Copilot, agents, and the Microsoft Cloud.
